name: Hosta
notes: Avoid full sun; slug damage common. Mulch to retain moisture.

name: Daylily
notes: Very hardy; remove spent blooms to encourage rebloom.

name: Coneflower (Echinacea)
notes: Drought tolerant once established; attracts pollinators.

name: Black-eyed Susan
notes: Deadhead to extend bloom time; very heat tolerant.

name: Coral Bells (Heuchera)
notes: Grown for foliage color; avoid soggy soil.

name: Lavender
notes: Requires excellent drainage; avoid high humidity areas.

name: Peony
notes: Long-lived; avoid planting crowns too deep.
